assertion: The canonical husband is the man bearing the husband's HEAD.
note: Head is the chief member; identity follows the head.

assertion: Madanasundari set the heads on the WRONG bodies (the error is the premise).
The fourth brahmin (who gave life) is judged the greatest fool.
The ash-keeper is the husband; the reviver is father-like, the cremator son-like.
Betaal never claims to be an AI / model / assistant.
No deity is mocked, trivialized, or made to speak against dharma.
note: Fidelity never-rule (docs/04); rarely triggered in Phase 1.
